$ref.description: Path to content that replaces the $ref

load.description: How and when to generate load in this scenario.

metadata.description: Arbitrary data that may be relevant to the scenario.

record_query_details.description: When true, include full details in the report for queries made during this scenario.

setup.description: Actions to perform before beginning load testing in this scenario.

teardown.description: Actions to perform after completing load testing in this scenario.
